field_values.action_summary: To escape, the protagonist performs a massive thirty-foot leap, landing on the far side of the enclosure. The Martians witness this feat, shifting their view of him from prey to a "wonderful discovery."
field_values.camera_intent: Slow-motion or wide tracking shots of the massive leap; Reaction shots from martian_warriors showing shock/interest; Wide shots establishing the thirty-foot distance covered
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Precise trajectory and landing point of the jump relative to the enclosure walls
Visual scale relationship between martian_warriors and protagonist
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH003_SC004

## Production Intent
The protagonist must execute a physically impossible thirty-foot leap across the circular_moss_basin to escape capture. This feat serves as the pivot point where martian_warriors cease viewing the protagonist as prey and begin treating him as a scientific specimen or discovery.

## Required Cast
- protagonist
- martian_warriors

## Required Environments
- circular_moss_basin (including low walled enclosure and glass roof incubator)

## Continuity Constraints
- Precise trajectory and landing point of the jump relative to the enclosure walls
- Visual scale relationship between martian_warriors and protagonist

## Beat List
- BT001: Protagonist prepares for the leap under pressure
- BT002: The massive thirty-foot leap
- BT003: Martians witness the feat and shift perspective
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
